name: io.github.cam10001110101/obsidian-jsoncanvas
title: Obsidian JSON Canvas
description: Create, validate, read, edit, export, and search JSON Canvas (.canvas) files.

environmentVariables.name: OUTPUT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Directory where .canvas files are written and read.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_CORS_ORIGINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed CORS origins for the HTTP transport; set specific origins for non-local use (avoid '*').

environmentVariables.name: OUTPUT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Directory inside the container where .canvas files are written and read; mount a volume here to persist output.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host for the streamable-http transport; use 0.0.0.0 to expose the container port.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_CORS_ORIGINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed CORS origins for the HTTP transport; set specific origins for non-local use (avoid '*').
